query:
SELECT sb.customerExternalId, sb.externalId AS sasboss_id, sb.monthlyCost AS sasboss_cost, real.externalId AS real_id, real.supplierName AS real_supplier, real.monthlyCost AS real_cost
FROM services sb
JOIN services real ON real.customerExternalId = sb.customerExternalId AND real.supplierName != 'SasBoss' AND real.serviceType = 'Internet' AND real.status != 'terminated'
WHERE sb.supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND sb.serviceType = 'Internet' AND sb.status != 'terminated'
ORDER BY sb.customerExternalId
LIMIT 15;
